name: playPopularKpopSong
description: Find and play the most popular K-pop song this month

timePeriod.description: Time period for the chart (e.g., 'this month', 'this week')

steps.observedOutputFormat: HTML page with K-pop chart rankings

parameters.prompt: Extract the #1 song from this K-pop chart. Return a JSON object with 'trackName' (song title) and 'artist' (artist name) fields. If there are multiple artists, put them in a single string separated by commas.
